criteria.description: configure() is idempotent across repeated calls
criteria.evidence: src/core/Collector.swift: configure() now guards on a `didConfigure` flag and returns early on the second call.

criteria.description: collect() rejects payloads larger than 256KB with a typed error
criteria.evidence: No size check found in collect(); src/core/Collector.swift still appends without bounding length. PayloadTooLarge error type is not defined anywhere in the diff.

criteria.description: public API surface is unchanged for existing callers
criteria.evidence: Diff only adds internal members; no existing public signatures were modified or removed.

reasons: C2 not met: collect() in src/core/Collector.swift has no 256KB bound; oversize payloads are still accepted.
C2 not met: the typed error (PayloadTooLarge) required by the criterion is not declared.
Tests testRejectsOversizePayload and testErrorTypeIsTyped fail for the same reason as C2.
next_actions: Add a `PayloadTooLarge` error to the SDK's public error enum.
In collect(), measure encoded byte length and throw PayloadTooLarge when it exceeds 256 * 1024 before appending.
Do not modify the failing tests; make them pass.
